steps.title: Set up the equation
steps.content:
We need to find $x$ where $g(x) = -216$. Substituting into the function:
$$-18 - 9x = -216$$

steps.title: Backsolve with choice B
steps.content:
Backsolving — testing choice B (22):
Substitute $x = 22$:
$$-18 - 9(22) = -18 - 198 = -216$$
This equals our target of $-216$. That matches choice B — B is correct.
